languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

languages.text: "Бог Император да благословит милосердие Вольного Торговца! Ни один честный слуга Империума не заслуживает быть запертым в плену ксеноса, и Себериан фон Валанциус — тем более!"
"God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"
languages.original_text: "Бог Император да благословит милосердие Вольного Торговца! Ни один честный слуга Империума не заслуживает быть запертым в плену ксеноса, и Себериан фон Валанциус — тем более!"

traits.locale_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"
"God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"
"God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

languages.text: 「神皇帝が、ローグ・トレーダーの慈悲を祝福せよ！帝国の誠実な臣下は、異種族に捕らえられるに値しない。特にシベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスはそうである！」
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝が、このならず者の商人たちの慈悲に恵まれんことを！帝国の誠実な臣下は、異種族に捕らえられるに値しない。特にシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスはそうである！」

languages.text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu bénisse la clémence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ! Aucun honnête serviteur de l'Imperium ne mérite d'être retenu prisonnier par un xénos, surtout pas Seberian von Valancius ! »
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

traits.locale_text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu bénisse la clémence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ! Aucun honnête serviteur de l'Imperium ne mérite d'être retenu prisonnier par un xénos, surtout pas Seberian von Valancius ! »

languages.text: "Der Gottimperator segne die Gnade {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}! Kein ehrlicher Diener des Imperiums verdient es, von einem Xenos gefangen gehalten zu werden, am allerwenigsten Seberian von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Gottimperator segne die Gnade {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}! Kein ehrlicher Diener des Imperiums verdient es, von einem Xenos gefangen gehalten zu werden, am allerwenigsten Seberian von Valancius!"

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator, Hür Tacir'in merhametini kutsasın! İmparatorluk'un hiçbir dürüst hizmetkârı bir zeno tarafından esir tutulmayı hak etmez, hele Seberian von Valancius hiç hak etmez!"
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator, Hür Tacir'in merhametini kutsasın! İmparatorluk'un hiçbir dürüst hizmetkârı bir zeno tarafından esir tutulmayı hak etmez, hele Seberian von Valancius hiç hak etmez!"

languages.text: «¡Que el Dios Emperador bendiga la misericordia {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente! ¡Ningún honrado siervo del Imperium merece ser cautivo de un xenos, y Seberian von Valancius menos que nadie!».
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el Dios Emperador bendiga la misericordia {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente! ¡Ningún honrado siervo del Imperium merece ser cautivo de un xenos, y Seberian von Valancius menos que nadie!».

languages.text: “愿神皇赐福于行商浪人的仁慈之举！没有哪个帝国的忠实仆人应当受到被异形囚禁的待遇，尤其那人还是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯！”
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"
